name: Shamrock Cookies 'n' Mint Dessert
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Butter; softened (do not use margarine)
7 oz Cookies 'n' Mint Chocolate (HERSHEY'S), broken into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Line a 13x9x2-inch baking pan with foil and grease the foil.
2. In a large bowl, beat together flour, sugar, cocoa, butter, eggs, and corn syrup until smooth. Finely chop the Cookies 'n' Mint Chocolate using a food processor and stir it into the flour mixture. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
3. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes or until the mixture begins to pull away from the sides of the pan. Allow the cake to cool completely on a wire rack. Spread the filling evenly over the cooled cake and cover; refrigerate.
4. Prepare the topping by melting the Cookies 'n' Mint Chocolate pieces in a microwave-safe bowl with 1/3 cup whipping cream for 45 seconds or until melted and well blended when stirred. Pour the topping over the filling, gently spreading it evenly over the entire top. Cover and refrigerate until firm.
Top Topping: In a medium bowl, combine 2 cups powdered sugar, 1/2 cup (1 stick) softened butter, 2 tablespoons milk, and a few drops of green food coloring (if desired). Beat until smooth and to the desired consistency.
Topping: Unwrap 7 oz HERSHEY'S Cookies 'n' Mint Chocolate; break into pieces. In a small microwave-safe bowl, melt the chocolate pieces with 1/3 cup whipping cream for 45 seconds or until melted and well blended when stirred.
